resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to an incredible opportunity to own a spacious and well-designed 2 BHK flat in the prestigious VIVA City, located in the sought-after neighborhood of Kondapur, Hyderabad. This property offers a comfortable and convenient living space, perfect for individuals or families looking for a modern and stylish home.Property specifications and facilitiesWith a carpet area of 990 sqft and situated on the 13th floor of a 22-story building, this flat boasts breathtaking views and a serene living environment. It is vaastu compliant and faces the east, ensuring positive energy and abundant natural light throughout the day.The flat is unfurnished, providing you with the flexibility to furnish and decorate the space according to your personal taste and preferences. It features two bedrooms, offering ample space for rest and relaxation. The two bathrooms, both attached and with Western-style fittings, provide convenience and comfort. The flat also boasts two balconies attached to the hall, providing delightful views of the clubhouse and creating a serene ambiance.The living cum dining area is spacious and perfect for entertaining guests. The normal kitchen comes with a piped gas connection, and a utility area is available for added convenience. The flooring of the flat is adorned with elegant vitrified tiles, adding a touch of sophistication to the overall aesthetic.Parking is convenient, with covered parking available. The property ensures 24-hour water supply and provides 100 power backup. The presence of a security guard and CCTV cameras ensures your safety and peace of mind. The building is equipped with three lifts, providing easy access to different floors.LocalityLocated just 200 to 300 meters away from MyHome Mangala, this flat enjoys close proximity to various amenities. Schools, hospitals, malls, supermarkets, public transportation including buses and autos, banksATMs, the railway station just 2 km away, and a metro station 4 km away, all contribute to the convenience and well-connected lifestyle.Dont miss this golden opportunity to own a spacious 2 BHK flat in VIVA City, Kondapur, Hyderabad. Contact us today to schedule a visit and make this wonderful flat your new home.

resultList.dtldesc: Spacious 4 BHK Villa in Kismatpur, HyderabadLocated in the well-developed residential neighbourhood of Kismatpur, Hyderabad, this ready-to-move 4 BHK villa in SM Enclave offers a blend of privacy, space, and connectivity. Positioned near Rock Church, Kismatpur, the property enjoys a calm residential setting while remaining well connected to key city routes and daily conveniences, making it an ideal choice for families seeking independent living.Property SpecificationsThe villa is built across ground plus one floor and offers a super built-up area of approximately 2000 sq. ft. with a carpet area of around 2200 sq. ft. The layout comprises four spacious bedrooms and four bathrooms, ensuring comfort and privacy for all occupants. Two balconies enhance ventilation and provide pleasant views of the garden and the main road. The living and dining areas are well separated, allowing for functional zoning of spaces suitable for both family use and entertaining guests.The kitchen setup includes a modular kitchen along with an open kitchen concept, fitted with a chimney to support modern cooking requirements. The villa is semi-furnished, allowing flexibility for further personalisation. The flooring is finished in durable materials suitable for long-term residential use. The property is east-facing and is approximately 5 to 10 years old, reflecting a well-established and maintained structure. Additional rooms include a puja room, study, and store room, adding to the practicality of the home.FacilitiesThe villa benefits from 24-hour water supply and is part of a gated environment offering a secure living experience. Open and covered parking provisions are available for residents. The property is held under freehold ownership, ensuring clear and secure title. The residential enclave also provides access to amenities such as jogging and strolling tracks, outdoor tennis courts, and laundry services, contributing to a balanced lifestyle within the community.LocalityKismatpur is a preferred residential destination in Hyderabad, known for its green surroundings and improving infrastructure. The property enjoys good connectivity to major roads, with access to public transport facilities, schools, hospitals, supermarkets, and daily convenience stores within a reasonable distance. Its proximity to established residential and commercial zones enhances long-term value and ease of living.Ideal Occupier ProfileThis villa is well suited for families looking for a spacious independent home in a peaceful yet well-connected locality. It is also a strong option for end users seeking a long-term residence with modern layout planning and community amenities in a growing residential corridor of Hyderabad.

resultList.dtldesc: Located in the developing and well-connected neighbourhood of Bachupally, Hyderabad, this 2 BHK apartment offers a practical and comfortable living space, ideal for families and professionals. The living and dining spaces are arranged in an L-shaped layout, enhancing spatial flow and natural ventilation. The kitchen is a standard setup with a normal platform and provisions for future customisation. The property is semi-furnished, allowing flexibility for personalisation according to individual preferences.::::Facilities::::The apartment includes one covered parking space and benefits from 24-hour water supply. The society also features plantation and water sourced from Manjira, contributing to a sustainable and well-maintained residential environment.::::Locality::::Bachupally is a strategically located area with schools and hospitals within 1 km, making it convenient for families. The nearest metro station is approximately 5–6 km, and the railway station is 10–12 km away, offering good connectivity to central Hyderabad. The neighbourhood is supported by retail outlets, supermarkets, and other essential services, providing a balanced blend of accessibility and tranquillity.::::This 2 BHK apartment in Bachupally offers a ready-to-move, semi-furnished home with modern interiors, functional design, and excellent locality advantages, making it a suitable choice for families and professionals in Hyderabad.

resultList.dtldesc: Designed with perfection, this beautiful 4BHK flat located in Hivision Residency, Kompally, Hyderabad is up for sale. Situated in a prime location, this abode is certainly a smart investment to secure your future and to enjoy an independent living with your dear ones.Note - 3rd and 4th floor are available for saleProperty SpecificationsTo ensure overall prosperity and good health of the residents, this north-west facing flat is beautifully designed in accordance with vaastu guidelines. This flat with a super area of 2106 sqft and carpet area of 1667 sqft is thoughtfully designed to welcome fresh air and sunlight, hence you need not depend on artificial lights during the day time.Comprising living room, dining room, 4 bedrooms, kitchen with utility area, 3 bathrooms and 1 balcony, this flat is semi furnished and is completely ready to move in. The flat is decked up with ceramic flooring which is known for its quality and durability.The kitchen is well equipped with a cooking platform, sink and there is a provision for exhaust fan and piped gas connection. Offering unblocked views of the road, the balcony linked with the living room is perfect for relaxing for sometime after a long day at work. All the three bathrooms are western fashioned and are equipped with geysers for uninterrupted hot water supply. Two of the bathrooms are attached to two bedrooms whereas one is available for common use. FacilitiesHivision Residency offers recreational amenities such as a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, park, banquet hall, jogging and strolling track and outdoor tennis courts. Apart from these, other prime facilities provided include one covered parking space, 24 hours water supply, power backup, 2 lifts, reserved parking, security guards with CCTV surveillance, intercom facility, maintenance staff, internetwi-fi connectivity and piped gas.LocalityThe nearest landmark for the property is Cine Planet Kompally. A number of noted educational institutions, medical health care centers and shopping outlets are present within a range of 12km from this property. For all your financial transactions, you can find major banks and ATMs within the vicinity. Kompally is a well known location offering easy access to all the social amenities via different modes of public transport. The Bolarum Railway Station 3km and Secunderabad Railway Station 10km are easily accessible.
